sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114434" key="xori/ambos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χορῐ´αμβ-ος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, in metre, <sense id="n114434.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">choriambus,</tr_> i.e. foot of four syllables (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">- ̆ ̆ -</etym>), consisting of a <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chorius</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">- ̆</etym>) and <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">iambus</tr_> (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">̆ -</etym>), <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1402.tlg001:3:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.22</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
